mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_log ( log_id, user_id, memory_id, raw_text, intent, create_time, event_date ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{userId}, #{memoryId}, #{rawText}, #{intent}, #{createTime}, #{eventDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT memory_id FROM chat_log WHERE SUBSTRING_INDEX(memory_id, ':', 1) = #{userId} ORDER BY memory_id
SELECT log_id, memory_id, raw_text, intent, create_time, event_date FROM chat_log WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_log ( log_id, user_id, memory_id, raw_text, intent, create_time, event_date ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{userId}, #{memoryId}, #{rawText}, #{intent}, #{createTime}, #{eventDate} )
